Dashboard metrics and financial calculations.

Coordinates full sync and entity-level push/pull operations.

Transaction sync state with auto-sync on focus and manual sync.

Extended report data hook for detailed report screens.
App settings state (biometrics, notifications, pay day, daily limit, etc.).
Biometric authentication hook.
Generic async operation wrapper with loading/error state.

architecture.app: File-system routes representing top-level screens for dashboard, transactions, budgets, goals, reports, settings, auth, calendar, categories, payees, quick transactions, and setup flows.
architecture.src/components: Reusable UI components grouped by feature (budgets, calendar, categories, common, dashboard, goals, payees, reports, transactions) plus legacy root-level shared components.
architecture.src/store: React contexts for auth, theme, and toast state.
architecture.src/db: SQLite database initialization and query modules. queries.ts is a barrel re-export; entity-specific logic lives in dedicated files (metaQueries, transactionQueries, quickTransactionQueries, etc.).
architecture.src/services: Business/data services plus Supabase sync orchestration. src/services/sync contains per-entity sync modules.
architecture.src/hooks: Feature and screen hooks for data loading, filtering, sync, and settings.
architecture.src/utils: Date, formatting, validation, mapping, timestamp, and logging helpers.
architecture.src/styles: Shared spacing, typography, layout, card, and common style primitives.
architecture.src/constants: Shared constants for tables, sync, and app values.
architecture.__tests__: Jest tests for services, utilities, queries, and components.
architecture.__mocks__: Mocks for Jest, including Expo SQLite.
architecture.assets: Expo app icons and splash/favicon assets.
architecture.android: Generated/native Android project for Expo native builds.

rules: Do NOT scan entire codebase unless required
Preserve offline-first SQLite behavior when changing data flows
Keep Supabase sync status and soft-delete fields consistent
Use existing hooks/services before adding new screen-level data logic
Use shared styles from src/styles and theme colors from ThemeContext
Add or update focused Jest tests for query, service, or utility changes
